overview: A manager-only New Store Opening checklist and progress tracker for the Bubba's 33 management team, added alongside the existing roadie position training libraries.
features: Manager/Admin-only New Store Opening tracker in the top nav
Ordered phases with collapsible sections and red progress bars
Task rows with checkboxes, assign-to-manager, and editable completion dates
Overall progress header across all phases
Immediate save when a task is checked
Add, edit, reorder, and delete phases and tasks
Bulk import tasks from pasted JSON with a summary
